title: Local lab
description: RCA SOP sandbox — wafer/defect history → rank-factors → KB-filter → report, against the provisioned in-house tools.

suggestions.label: Pull wafer history + rank factors
suggestions.prompt: Use wafer-history to pull the history for these wafers: W25-12345-A07, A08, A09, A12, A15. Then run rank-factors-categorical with my defect counts.

suggestions.label: Default lot → top suspects
suggestions.prompt: Pull a default lot via wafer-history, summarise it with csv-column-summary, then run rank-factors-categorical to surface the top suspect tools.
